---
title: "New National Poetry Cards, Standards 6 and 7.  Edited and Annotated by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## New National Poetry Cards, Standards 6 and 7.  Edited and Annotated by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: critical anthology
**Format:** 18cm [???]

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
